evals.prompt: Đưa 2 custom Polaris component (ví dụ một color/swatch selector và một icon selector) trong frontend của app lên Claude Design thành gallery tương tác, đủ các state.
evals.expected_output: Companion bundle built from the real sources (window.<AppUI>); a gallery card where the swatch opens the real picker, the hex field edits, the icon active-state toggles; console clean; state matrix in .prompt.md matches rendered cells.

evals.prompt: Bóc tách một image-dropzone component thành design system component trên claude design — phải cover cả state empty, đã có ảnh, và lỗi validate (file quá size).
evals.expected_output: Gallery covers empty / preview / error states; error state reachable by interaction (not a static mock); fixture shapes derived from the component's validation/useController usage; any pre-existing app warning documented, not patched.

evals.prompt: Sync toàn bộ một folder custom component lên Claude Design làm design system dùng chung cho team.
evals.expected_output: Inventory + classification first (compileable vs hand-build fallback); ONE build with all components; per-component cards in group '<App> components/'; NOTES.md updated with the rebuild command; re-sync gotcha noted.

evals.prompt: Compile một page dạng form (có tab, modal, save bar) lên claude design, giữ nguyên UX flow.
evals.expected_output: Page compiled via --pages with the app's config; mounted in MemoryRouter; selectors traced to build the __APP_STATE__ fixture; on-mount service calls fixtured via window.fetch; modals open as overlays; click-test per handler.

evals.prompt: Team có một Shopify app khác (repo frontend React+Polaris riêng). Setup để bóc component của app đó lên claude design.
evals.expected_output: Follows §Per-app config: checks the app's DS is synced first; inspects vite config for alias/publicDir; copies configs/_template.json → configs/<app>.json (NOT reusing another app's answers); smoke-builds 2-3 components; runs the four verify gates before trusting the config.
